description: Publish a campfire's beacon to a gateway campfire (route advertisement)

args.name: campfire
args.description: Target campfire — name, alias, cf:// URI, or ID

args.name: transport
args.description: Transport protocol (open string — recommended values listed, new transports do not require a declaration update)

args.name: timestamp
args.description: Unix epoch seconds, covered by inner_signature

args.name: convention_version
args.description: Convention version that produced this beacon (e.g., '0.4.1')

args.name: inner_signature
args.description: Beacon signed by campfire key (hex) — covers campfire, endpoint, transport, description, join_protocol, timestamp, convention_version
